_naming: Slugs and paths use game/domains.json ids (kronos, thalassa, infernus, anemos). upload:site migrates legacy terra/aqua/ignis/zephyr storage + DB rows without re-uploading.

ability.name: Bedrock Aegis

ability.name: Verdant Mending
ability.text: Regenerate 2. Give an allied unit +2 Health and Rooted until end of turn.

ability.name: Stonefang Ambush
ability.text: Stealth until this unit attacks. Charge. Deal 3 damage to a damaged enemy unit.

ability.text: Siege 2. When this unit attacks a player, deal 2 damage to all enemy units.

ability.name: Mossfang Rush
ability.text: Charge. Overwhelm.

ability.name: Tidebind
ability.text: Freeze an enemy unit until end of turn. Draw a card if it was already damaged.

ability.name: Abyssal Hunger
ability.text: Taunt. When this unit survives combat, Devour the weakest enemy unit with 3 or less Health.

ability.name: Coral Dirge
ability.text: Reborn. Enemy units at this location get -1 Attack.

ability.name: Siren's Lure
ability.text: Charm: redirect an enemy unit's next attack to a random valid target.

ability.name: Depth Strike
ability.text: Ranged. Deal 4 damage to the enemy unit with the lowest Health.

ability.name: Forge Retaliation
ability.text: Taunt. Armor 2. When damaged, deal 1 damage to all enemy units.

ability.name: Molten Entry
ability.text: Charge. Deal 4 damage to all enemy units when this enters play.

ability.name: Ember Call
ability.text: Deal 3 damage to an enemy unit. If it dies, summon a 1/1 Ember to your side.

ability.name: Ash Frenzy
ability.text: Charge. Lifesteal. Destroy this unit at end of turn.

ability.name: Iron Bindings
ability.text: Enemy units cannot Charge. Deal 2 damage to an enemy unit that attacked this turn.

ability.name: Void Ambush
ability.text: Stealth. Charge. Ambush: +3 Attack on the turn this enters play.

ability.name: Maelstrom Weave
ability.text: Deal 2 damage to all enemy units. Return a small enemy unit to its owner's hand.

ability.name: Skyward Aegis
ability.text: Flying. Ward. Give an allied unit Flying until end of turn.

ability.name: Bloodwind Dive

ability.text: Deathrattle: give an allied unit Ward and draw a card.
